title: Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) Annual Report and Accounts 2024/25 (for the year ended 31 March 2025)
body: "This document was presented to Parliament pursuant to paragraphs 11(4) and 15(3) of Schedule 1ZA of the Financial Services and Markets Act 2000 as amended by the Financial Services Act 2012 and the Financial Services (Banking Reform) Act 2013. "
